name: Monkey.D.Luffy (OP05-119) (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] DON!! -10: Place all of your Characters except this Character at the bottom of your deck in any order. Then, take an extra turn after this one.[Activate:Main][Once Per Turn] (1): Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the artist credit (note the lack of pen symbol next to the artist name).
